symptoms.symptom_name: Tense clear plantar vesicles WITH concurrent classic tinea (webs/moccasin/nails)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Plantar vesicles with concurrent web-space/moccasin/nail tinea indicate a dermatophyte-triggered id reaction.
Concurrent classic tinea features favour a dermatophyte trigger over primary eczema.

symptoms.symptom_name: Clear serous, tense deep-seated vesicles (not pustular/impetiginous)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clear serous fluid argues against sterile pustules.
Tense deep vesicles without honey crust argue against impetigo.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Tinea is clinical; scraping if uncertain.
If treating nails with oral antifungal.
